rows.caveat: Accepted as MP11 comparison evidence only; not model input.
rows.release_implication: Primary harvest-flow target for Phase 13 comparison.

rows.caveat: Accepted for comparison planning; do not use as model input.
rows.release_implication: Supports the flat MP11 base-case trajectory anchor.

rows.caveat: LRSY is not the base-case AAC/harvest level.
rows.release_implication: Context only; do not compare candidate runtime as if LRSY were the base case.

rows.metric_label: P12.5 tracked runtime smoke mean annual harvest
rows.caveat: P12.5 used a high minimum harvested-volume smoke target and did not include the maintainer's maintain-initial-growing-stock target.
rows.release_implication: Shows runtime capability and order of magnitude, not release-calibrated base-case behavior.

rows.metric_label: P12.5 tracked runtime smoke minimum annual harvest
rows.caveat: Period-level minimum across nonzero P12.5 smoke periods.
rows.release_implication: Useful runtime diagnostic only.

rows.metric_label: P12.5 tracked runtime smoke maximum annual harvest
rows.caveat: Period-level maximum across nonzero P12.5 smoke periods.
rows.release_implication: Useful runtime diagnostic only.

rows.metric_label: P12.5 tracked runtime smoke final-period annual harvest
rows.caveat: Final period is a smoke-run endpoint, not a release target.
rows.release_implication: Useful runtime diagnostic only.

rows.caveat: Approximate screenshot/context value; no tracked exported scenario table yet.
rows.release_implication: Motivates formal reproducible scenario export before release decisions.

rows.metric_label: Candidate P9RF current THLB versus MP11 declared THLB
rows.caveat: P9RF is candidate scaffold THLB, not final release truth.
rows.release_implication: Supports plausibility but requires Phase 13 release QA and caveat documentation.

rows.metric_label: Total TFL area / total land base
rows.candidate_anchor: P1.6 current FADM-derived TFL 6 AOI: 217042.71895 ha
rows.caveat: Reviewed planning comparison row. Values are not accepted model inputs until a later implementation phase explicitly promotes them.
rows.release_implication: Rounded MP11 land-base area is within 0.1% of the Phase 5 FADM-derived AOI; boundary area is effectively aligned for planning comparison.

rows.caveat: Reviewed planning comparison row. Values are not accepted model inputs until a later implementation phase explicitly promotes them.
rows.release_implication: MP11 total forested area is close to the Phase 2 smoke checkpoint; difference is small relative to total land base.

rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 accepted AFLB resultant-fragment area: 191168.597386 ha
rows.caveat: Reviewed planning comparison row. Values are not accepted model inputs until a later implementation phase explicitly promotes them.
rows.release_implication: MP11 productive forest is lower than the accepted Phase 5 AFLB surface. This is a direct Phase 6 land-base delta requiring source-layer and netdown review.

rows.caveat: Reviewed planning comparison row. Values are not accepted model inputs until a later implementation phase explicitly promotes them.
rows.release_implication: MP11 total operable area is materially lower than the Phase 2 smoke checkpoint; operability and economic operability assumptions need dedicated P6.4 review.

rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 accepted weighted THLB area: 139995.798287 ha
rows.caveat: Reviewed planning comparison row. Values are not accepted model inputs until a later implementation phase explicitly promotes them.
rows.release_implication: MP11 current THLB is substantially lower than the accepted Phase 5 THLB surface. This is the central land-base delta for MP11 model-overhaul planning.

rows.metric_label: NCLB / productive forest not available for harvesting
rows.caveat: Reviewed planning comparison row. Values are not accepted model inputs until a later implementation phase explicitly promotes them.
rows.release_implication: MP11 NCLB is higher than the Phase 5 NTHLB surface, consistent with the lower MP11 THLB.

rows.metric_label: Long-term land base after future roads
rows.candidate_anchor: Scaled MP10 long-term landbase benchmark: 134598.87 ha
rows.caveat: Reviewed planning comparison row. Values are not accepted model inputs until a later implementation phase explicitly promotes them.
rows.release_implication: MP11 long-term land base is materially lower than the prior scaled benchmark; Phase 5 did not implement future-road long-term adjustment as an active base-lane output.

rows.metric_label: Current AAC-supporting THLB from previous MPs
rows.caveat: Reviewed planning comparison row. Values are not accepted model inputs until a later implementation phase explicitly promotes them.
rows.release_implication: MP11 reports a previous-MP aggregated THLB close to the Phase 5 scaled benchmark, supporting the earlier benchmark as a reasonable planning reference.

rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta 7334.0 ha; THLB-net delta  ha
rows.caveat: MP11 adds 7,334 ha of conserved productive forest in legal/proposed OGMAs and WHAs. Legal designations may be public; proposed areas require careful source/version review.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.3/P6.4; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.metric_label: Additional land-base values: research, PSPs, big trees, karst
rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta 25207.0 ha; THLB-net delta 3910.0 ha
rows.caveat: MP11 explicitly adds THLB exclusions for values not specifically accounted for in previous MPs. Karst and big-tree evidence may be partly public/proxy; PSP/research-site details may not be fully public.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.3/P6.4; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta 20720.0 ha; THLB-net delta 4032.0 ha
rows.caveat: MP11 increases non/low productivity net THLB reductions by 4,032 ha. This likely requires revisiting VRI productivity, LiDAR height/productivity proxies, and low-site rules.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.3/P6.4; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta 17490.0 ha; THLB-net delta 8383.0 ha
rows.caveat: MP11 materially increases inoperable net THLB reductions. A public DEM/slope proxy can be rebuilt, but WFP's land-base blocking and economic operability logic may not be fully public.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.4; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta 31933.0 ha; THLB-net delta -8477.0 ha
rows.caveat: MP11 reports much larger riparian productive area but lower net THLB reduction due to overlaps with earlier exclusions. This needs ordered-overlay reproduction, not independent category summation.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.3/P6.4; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta 10708.0 ha; THLB-net delta 2508.0 ha
rows.caveat: MP11 adds LiDAR 90%+ slope logic and reports terrain/slope net reductions. Public DEM can approximate this, but source-specific LiDAR products may not be available.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.4; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta 7287.0 ha; THLB-net delta 690.0 ha
rows.caveat: MP11 tracks existing WTRAs spatially and future stand-level reserves separately. Future WTRAs remain partly aspatial policy assumptions.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.3/P6.4; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.metric_label: 95% CMAI minimum harvest age plus 350 m3/ha minimum volume
rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta  ha; THLB-net delta  ha
rows.caveat: MP11 replaces harvest-system/DBH MHA logic with 95% CMAI and minimum volume criteria. This is a yield/treatment/model-behavior change rather than a land-base area deduction.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.4/P6.5; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.metric_label: VQO, ECA, adjacency/green-up, and Patchworks spatial modelling
rows.mp11_anchor: productive delta  ha; THLB-net delta  ha
rows.caveat: Several MP11 changes limit harvest levels without directly reducing THLB. They need Patchworks constraint/scenario planning, not only source-layer netdown work.
rows.release_implication: Follow-up lane P6.5/P6.6; keep visible in Phase 13 caveats.

rows.mp11_anchor: MP11 Base Case is an even-flow harvest projection over 300 years, net of 1.5% non-recoverable losses, and represents about 90% of adjusted LRSY. Numeric anchor: Base Case `1,061,600 m3/year`; current AAC `1,362,000 m3/year`; reported decrease `22.1%`.
rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 has a launch-smoked teaching runtime with generic managed CC harvest signals, but no accepted AAC-equivalent base-case calibration.
rows.caveat: Do not claim the Phase 5 teaching runtime reproduces this AAC forecast.
rows.release_implication: Use the MP11 base-case harvest level as a future calibration and QA target after source-layer, AU/yield, MHA, and constraint rebuilds are complete.

rows.mp11_anchor: MP11 evaluates maintaining current AAC for 10 years and maximizing short-term harvest with controlled mid-term effects. Numeric anchor: Maintain-current-AAC long-term endpoint `1,055,200`; maximize-short-term first decade `1,147,700` and long-term endpoint `1,095,500` m3/year.
rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 includes a representative max-even-flow smoke mode, but it was a runtime-signal smoke rather than a reviewed MP11-style flow comparison.
rows.caveat: The existing runtime smoke proves capability, not MP11-equivalent behavior.
rows.release_implication: Add explicit harvest-flow scenario definitions and QA metrics after MP11 model inputs are rebuilt.

rows.mp11_anchor: MP11 is more sensitive to managed-stand yield changes than natural-stand yield changes; LiDAR/ITI/LEFI and reduced OAF1 produce the largest uplift. Numeric anchor: Natural +10% `1,075,300`; natural -10% `1,036,600`; managed +10% `1,138,800`; managed -10% `970,900`; ITI/LEFI/OAF1 even-flow `1,150,300`.
rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 has reviewed VDYP/TIPSY curve surfaces, but no MP11-style sensitivity suite and no accepted LiDAR/ITI/LEFI input surface.
rows.caveat: The high-yield LiDAR/OAF1 scenario is evidence for scoping, not a public-data input.
rows.release_implication: Build a public-data sensitivity suite and isolate WFP-only LiDAR/ITI/LEFI uplift as an unavailable or explicitly approximated scenario.

rows.mp11_anchor: MP11 tests no genetic gain, full NSOG old-seral targets, MHA +/- 10 years, helicopter exclusion, and THLB +/- 10%. Numeric anchor: No genetic gain `1,004,000`; full NSOG `1,049,400`; MHA +10 `956,000`; MHA -10 `1,074,300`; helicopter excluded `1,021,900`; THLB -10 `953,500`; THLB +10 `1,118,200` m3/year.
rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 documents these as deferred or scenario-worthy concepts, not as implemented MP11-equivalent sensitivity runs.
rows.caveat: These are candidate future scenario tests, not Phase 5 behavior claims.
rows.release_implication: Prioritize MHA, harvest-system exclusion, THLB adjustment, and genetic-gain sensitivities because their MP11 effects are numerically clear.

rows.mp11_anchor: MP11 recommends a step-down LiDAR/ITI/LEFI/OAF1 scenario for the next 10 years after the base-case analysis. Numeric anchor: AAC recommendation `1,252,700 m3/year`; uplift from Base Case `191,100 m3/year`; about `1.1%` below the scheduled MP10 decline benchmark.
rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 has no AAC-recommendation lane and must not be represented as a Chief-Forester-ready or WFP-model-equivalent forecast.
rows.caveat: The recommendation depends on WFP inventory/model assumptions that are not fully public.
rows.release_implication: Treat the AAC recommendation as a high-level target for a future MP11-aligned scenario, gated on inventory/yield and flow-policy decisions.

rows.mp11_anchor: MP11 reports base-case and AAC-recommendation THLB growing-stock trajectories split by <=120 and >120 year categories. Numeric anchor: Base-case total THLB GS min/max `35,088,106`/`41,629,956`; AAC recommendation min/max `37,823,276`/`40,829,741` m3.
rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 exposes managed/unmanaged area and yield signals, but does not publish MP11-style THLB growing-stock KPI trajectories.
rows.caveat: Figure values are comparison evidence from recovered chart data, not model input.
rows.release_implication: Add comparable growing-stock reports once MP11-aligned Patchworks outputs exist.

rows.mp11_anchor: MP11 reports harvest-system, block-size, harvest-age, harvested-area, volume-per-ha, species-composition, and elevation-band behavior for base-case and AAC scenarios. Numeric anchor: Base-case harvest-system average is 57% ground, 40% cable, and 3% helicopter; average block size is 19.1 ha; long-term harvested area averages 1,430 ha/year.
rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 explicitly defers ground/cable/heli assignment and carries harvest-system placeholders, so MP11 operational KPI comparison is mostly a future reporting gap.
rows.caveat: Do not backfill stand-level harvest systems from aggregate MP11 percentages.
rows.release_implication: Create public-data harvest-system proxies before attempting MP11-style operational KPI reports.

rows.mp11_anchor: MP11 reports age-class, cedar, old-cedar, and old-seral trajectories for base-case and AAC-recommendation scenarios. Numeric anchor: Phase 7 reviewed age-class, cedar, and old-seral figures for planning only; they were not promoted to comparison-accepted status.
rows.candidate_anchor: Phase 5 carries cedar signals for teaching/reporting, but no hard cedar reserve, utility-pole-grade, or MP11 old-seral KPI calibration.
rows.caveat: Planning-only figure evidence should not be mixed with accepted comparison rows.
rows.release_implication: Use planning-only evidence to design reports and stronger validation checks before promoting these KPI families.

rows.candidate_anchor: 13 track files; 86574 feature rows; 823 account rows
rows.caveat: Generated tracks are ignored local runtime outputs summarized by tracked QA.
rows.release_implication: Supports runtime buildability; archive/materialization QA remains P13.4.
